misconception: Plant and animal cells have identical parts
correction: Plant and animal cells share many organelles but plants have chloroplasts and a cell wall while animals do not.

misconception: Plants take in food from the soil
correction: Plants make their own food (glucose) via photosynthesis using light
column5: and water; soil provides minerals not food.

correction: All living cells (including plant and animal cells) perform cellular respiration to release energy from food.

misconception: Mitosis and meiosis are the same process
correction: Mitosis makes identical body cells; meiosis makes gametes and halves the chromosome number to increase diversity.

misconception: A hypothesis is just a guess
correction: A hypothesis is a testable explanation based on prior knowledge and observations.
